lines.speaker: Cave monk
lines.text: Be careful going in there! You are unarmed, and there is much evilness lurking down there! The evilness seems to block off our contact with our gods,

lines.speaker: Cave monk
lines.text: so our prayers seem to have less effect down there. Oh, also, you won't be able to come back this way - This ladder only goes one way!

lines.speaker: Cave monk
lines.text: The only exit from the caves below is a portal which leads only to the deepest wilderness!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't think I'm strong enough to enter then.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well that is a risk I will have to take.
